name: oac-cyberjack-rfid
description: Installable card and SAK-lite gate before XNP login.

interface.shortDescription: Installable card-reader prerequisite before XNP login.
interface.longDescription: Installable local Codex plugin for notary card-readiness before XNP login and Online HRA work. It checks BNotK chip/signature card or local Schneider/SCP-card availability where deployed, security-class-3 reader readiness, PC/SC state, BNotK SAK lite or XNP card path, secureFramework readiness and evidence metadata without PIN capture or card data extraction.
defaultPrompt: Check card and SAK-lite readiness before XNP login.
Create a notary card gate plan for Online HRA.
Review card-reader drift before XNP testing.
